name: Macadamia-Orange Fudge (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line an 8-inch square pan with foil.
2. Melt butter in a glass bowl on HIGH for 1 minute.
3. Stir in sugar and milk. Cook on HIGH for 8 minutes, stirring every 3 minutes.
4. Add marshmallows and chocolate; stir until smooth.
5. Stir in nuts and liqueur.
6. Pour into prepared pan.
7. Chill until firm.
8. Cut into pieces.
Makes 2 pounds.
